image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: CRISPR isn’t just Cas9. Meet Cas12 and Cas13!
Context visual: These two enzymes cut DNA and RNA in unique ways.
Escalation visual: Cas12 is known for its precise DNA editing, while Cas13 targets RNA.
Evidence visual: Research shows Cas12 can create fewer off-target effects than Cas9.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But guess what? Cas13 can silence viruses!
Payoff visual: Each tool is powerful in its domain, expanding our biotech toolbox.
Cta visual: Curious about more biotech breakthroughs? Hit subscribe!
